states.name: Ryoma
states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: Ryoma Sakamoto was born and raised in a small village tucked away in a corner of the Eastern Continent. Far from developed and with a modest population, the village was home to gentle and kind-hearted people. Thanks to her natural cheerfulness and friendly personality, she was loved by the villagers from a young age and spent her days as a beloved figure among them.

states.name: Ryoma
states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: However, one day, the village was suddenly attacked by an Oni known as Hoshikuma-Douji and her followers. Ryoma was ordered by her mother to hide under the eaves, where she held her breath, remaining perfectly still. When all was quiet, she fearfully stepped outside. There, she found the lifeless bodies of the villagers — including her parents — strewn across the ground.

states.name: Ryoma
states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: That day, Ryoma left the village and began traveling alone across the land, her hatred toward the Oni growing ever stronger in her heart. Eventually, she learned that the Oni leader resided in the capital. She vowed to defeat that leader with her own hands and made it her life's goal to build a peaceful world free of Oni.
